Cut mushrooms into halves, combine with Tamari just to cover and place in ~325°F oven for ~15 mins or until tender
Remove mushrooms from oven and cool in blast chiller
Once completely cool, add all ingredients to a vitamix blender and blend on high until smooth
Reserve in quart containers in the cooler
